description: Stellastra is a cybersecurity comparison and listing platform that ranks security vendors and products by factors such as security posture and category relevance. It also offers a reviews workflow that lets vendors submit customer ratings for email verification and publication.
summary: Stellastra exposes one documented REST API surface: the Stellastra Reviews API at `https://stellastra.com/api/`, authenticated with HTTP Basic using an account email and generated API key.
